event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 2 venue canonicalization: Score-O, Dickey Creek.
event_comments:
Control #52 was not up to the weather and refused to record punches. We have added points to those who told us they visited this control. If you didn’t receive credit for it and think you should, let us know.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Thanks to everyone who came out to debut our newest map at Dickey Creek. Huge thanks to John Brady for the excellent base map and to John, Dave Tallent, Chris Cooper, and Jackson Rupe for the mapping fieldwork. We would not have such a great map without their efforts.
Kudos to Chris and Ben Cooper and Dave Tallent, who built two footbridges across Dickey Creek on event day to help you keep your feet dry.

Control #52 was not up to the weather and refused to record punches. We have added points to those who told us they visited this control. If you didn’t receive credit for it and think you should, let us know.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Thanks to everyone who came out to debut our newest map at Dickey Creek. Huge thanks to John Brady for the excellent base map and to John, Dave Tallent, Chris Cooper, and Jackson Rupe for the mapping fieldwork. We would not have such a great map without their efforts.
Kudos to Chris and Ben Cooper and Dave Tallent, who built two footbridges across Dickey Creek on event day to help you keep your feet dry.
